title: auth.user.deletion_requested v1
description: Emitted by the auth service when a GDPR/ARCO erasure DSR (right to be forgotten) is requested. Consumed by all modules to anonymize data associated with the user.

user_id.description: UUID of the user whose data must be anonymized across all modules.

requested_at.description: Timestamp when the erasure request was received.

regulation.description: Applicable regulation: GDPR | ARCO | CCPA | other.

request_reference.description: External DSR ticket or case reference for audit trail.
